name: claude_skills
description: A comprehensive collection of 232+ coding skills and agent plugins designed to enhance productivity with multiple coding agents including Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI, Cursor, and others, covering domains like engineering, marketing, product management, compliance, and C-level advisory.

inputs.name: agent_name
inputs.description: The target coding agent or platform to apply the skill or plugin, e.g., Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI.

inputs.name: skill_name
inputs.description: The specific skill or plugin to be activated or utilized from the collection.

inputs.name: user_prompt
inputs.description: The input prompt or request sent to the agent enhanced by the skill or plugin.

inputs.name: context_data
inputs.description: Optional contextual information such as project details or domain-specific data used to tailor the skill execution.

outputs.name: agent_response
outputs.description: The generated output or response from the coding agent utilizing the designated skill or plugin.

outputs.name: execution_metadata
outputs.description: Information about the execution such as skill used, timestamp, and agent details.

steps: Select the target coding agent or platform to work with.
Identify the required skill or plugin based on task domain or function.
Prepare the input prompt and include any relevant context data.
Invoke the skill through the agent plugin interface to process the prompt.
Receive and handle the enhanced or specialized response from the agent.
Log execution details and optionally iterate with refined inputs.
use_cases: Integrating multi-domain coding skills to augment code generation workflows.
Using marketing and product-specific plugins for automated content and product management tasks.
Applying compliance and C-level advisory skills to ensure alignment with organizational policies.
Switching seamlessly between different code agents leveraging shared skill plugins.
patterns: Modular skill plugin architecture for multi-agent compatibility
Context-aware prompt enhancement for domain-specific tasks
Layered skill categorization by function: engineering, marketing, compliance, etc.

prompt_templates.name: skill_activation_prompt
prompt_templates.template: Activate the {skill_name} skill on {agent_name} with the following request: {user_prompt}

prompt_templates.name: contextual_task_request
prompt_templates.template: Using {skill_name}, perform the task considering this context: {context_data}. Task: {user_prompt}

prompt_templates.name: multi_agent_invoke
prompt_templates.template: Invoke {skill_name} across supported agents including {agent_list} with input: {user_prompt}
